content: We can reframe zero-shot prompting as an implicit intrinsic curiosity mechanism for large language model-based autonomous agents, where the open-ended prompt itself acts as the ICM's prediction error trigger to drive unscripted exploration of novel environments without pre-labeled task data. This creates a self-reinforcing loop where zero-shot generalization ability directly fuels the agent's intrinsic motivation to seek out high-uncertainty interactions that improve its generalization further.
